title: VANILLA PREMIEM (VNP)
description: A modpack that will make your dreams come true! Download goal: 100
body:
Hi! 
This modpack adds stuff like more biomes and better combat.
But that's not all! It also adds features like sounds, shaders, and more.
Features:
- Shaders
- Sounds
- Better combat
- Over 250 mods
- New biomes and exploration
- Qol
- Preformance
- And more

This modpack brings Vanilla Plus to life, adding tons of things to explore! 

!PREFORANCE WARNING!: When we loaded the modpack, the modpack hurt our CPU badly. Report to us your crashes and preformance issues to the comments.

Looking for a person to do the trailer!
